untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise pullback retracement thresholds (pullback_retracement_min/max), confirmation_candles_required count, and specific breakout magnitude multipliers which are marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source. These calibration parameters are missing and cannot be inferred from available indicators. Additionally, 'multiple consecutive bars' condition requires lookback array indexing beyond prev_* operators.
translation_notes: Translated core pattern logic: (1) Entry uses pivot crossover to detect breakout level + price retracement below previous swing + reversal candle (wick > body). (2) Exit uses breach of pullback support/resistance. (3) Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. (4) Stop loss and hold_days are estimated defaults. (5) Specific retracement percentages and candle confirmation counts must be calibrated separately with actual backtest data.
